name: Question

## Question

<!-- What would you like to know? Try to be specific. -->

## What you've already tried

<!--
  Searched the README? Read INSTALLATION.md? Checked the audit
  dashboard? Looked at docs/RUNBOOKS.md? Listing what you've already
  tried lets the maintainer skip ground you've covered.
-->

## Environment (if relevant)

<!-- Skip this section if the question is documentation-only. -->

- **Splunk Version**: (e.g., 9.3.1)
- **Whitelist Manager Version**: (run `grep ^version default/app.conf` or check Apps > Manage Apps)
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **User Role**: (e.g., `wl_analyst_editor`, `wl_admin`, `wl_superadmin`)

## Additional Context

<!--
  Screenshots, error messages, dashboard URLs — anything that helps
  the maintainer answer accurately.
-->
